bioconda.name: antismash
bioconda.summary: antiSMASH - the antibiotics and Secondary Metabolite Analysis SHell.

biocontainers.name: antismash
biocontainers.summary: Rapid genome-wide identification, annotation and analysis of secondary metabolite biosynthesis gene clusters in bacterial and fungal genomes. it integrates and cross-links with a large number of in silico secondary metabolite analysis tools that have been published earlier.

biotools.summary: Rapid genome-wide identification, annotation and analysis of secondary metabolite biosynthesis gene clusters in bacterial and fungal genomes. It integrates and cross-links with a large number of in silico secondary metabolite analysis tools that have been published earlier.

bioschemas.name: antiSMASH
bioschemas.summary: Rapid genome-wide identification, annotation and analysis of secondary metabolite biosynthesis gene clusters in bacterial and fungal genomes. It integrates and cross-links with a large number of in silico secondary metabolite analysis tools that have been published earlier.

galaxy.summary: Antismash allows the genome-wide identification, annotation and analysis of secondary metabolite biosynthesis gene clusters
galaxy.bio_tools_summary: Rapid genome-wide identification, annotation and analysis of secondary metabolite biosynthesis gene clusters in bacterial and fungal genomes. It integrates and cross-links with a large number of in silico secondary metabolite analysis tools that have been published earlier.
